The List of Individual and Enterprise Winners of First Umeng + 2019 UBDC "Data Awards" was Announced
Umenq+ Products Developer Center Community Brand Dynamics Log in
# The List of Individual and Enterprise Winners of the First Umeng + 2019
UBDC "Data Awards" was Announced
Latest News · Brand News

Abstract: "Data Awards" has the same pronunciation as "beacon" in Chinese. As one of the most influential awards in the field of mobile Internet, it aims to motivate benchmarking enterprises for data- based construction in the big data industry, as well as experts with outstanding contributions and influence, to jointly lead the forward development of the industry and promote the intelligent process of industry data.

On Nov. 19, the 2019 Universal Big Data Conference with the theme of "Gathering in the Cloud · Seeing the Extraordinary" was held in Beijing. Xinyu Peng, CEO of Umeng +, Jinpeng Luo, President of Umeng + jointly discussed the trend and application of data intelligence with more than 40 well- known enterprise leaders and industry experts; shared how to establish a data intelligence platform, how to use the advantages of cloud technology to solve the problem of enterprise data, and jointly helped and promoted the industry to accelerate the process of data.

In addition to wonderful theme sharing and cutting- edge technical ability exhibition of guests at the conference, the much- anticipated winners of the first "Data Awards" 2019 were also announced at the main conference venue.

# The List of Individual and Enterprise Winners of the First Umeng + 2019  

UBDC "Data Awards" was Announced  

Latest News · Brand News  

16018  

Nov. 19, 2019  

Abstract: "Data Awards" has the same pronunciation as "beacon" in Chinese. As one of the most influential awards in the field of mobile Internet, it aims to motivate benchmarking enterprises for data- based construction in the big data industry, as well as experts with outstanding contributions and influence, to jointly lead the forward development of the industry and promote the intelligent process of industry data.  

On Nov. 19, the 2019 Universal Big Data Conference with the theme of "Gathering in the Cloud · Seeing the Extraordinary" was held in Beijing. Xinyu Peng, CEO of Umeng +, Jinpeng Luo, President of Umeng + jointly discussed the trend and application of data intelligence with more than 40 well- known enterprise leaders and industry experts; shared how to establish a data intelligence platform, how to use the advantages of cloud technology to solve the problem of enterprise data, and jointly helped and promoted the industry to accelerate the process of data.  

In addition to wonderful theme sharing and cutting- edge technical ability exhibition of guests at the conference, the much- anticipated winners of the first "Data Awards" 2019 were also announced at the main conference venue.

text_blocks.text_content: Translation
The List of Individual and Enterprise Winners of First Umen \(^+\) 2019 UBDC "Data Awards" was Announced
(Some representatives of award- winning enterprises received the awards on stage)

"Helping global enterprises achieve data- based transformation and driving business growth" is the corporate vision and mission of Umen \(^+\) . Through nine years of deep work in the field of big data, Umen \(^+\) has become the leader in the field of big data in China. The purpose is to stimulate the industry's data construction benchmark enterprises, as well as outstanding contribution and influence of experts, so as to promote the process of data and intelligence in the industry.

"Data Awards" is pronounced the same as "beacon" in Chinese. As one of the most influential awards in the field of mobile Internet, "Data Awards" is jointly launched by Umen \(^+\) , Zhongguancun Big Data Industry Alliance, Tsingdata Big Data Industries Association and China Big Data Industry Observation. It aims to encourage the benchmarking enterprises for data- based construction in the industry, as well as experts with outstanding contributions and influence, to jointly lead the forward development of the industry and promote the intelligent process of industry data.

The first "Data Awards" in 2019 invited a jury of 21 judges from dozens of authorities and industry experts and scholars including China Academy of Information and Communications Technology, Tsinghua University and Peking University. During the two- month review period,

text_blocks.text_content: Translation

The List of Individual and Enterprise Winners of First Umeng + 2019 UBDC "Data Awards" was Announced through the development of professional selection models, seven categories of Data Awards finally emerged, with a total of 40 Data enterprises and 28 Data individuals standing out.
## List of Winners in the Enterprise Category of Data Awards in 2019:
## Data Awards· Best Data-Driven Growth Award

They always use the data analysis results to promote business growth, and apply the data in marketing promotion, user operation and other aspects. Through continuous data- driven and self- practice, the business has finally been helped to achieve significant growth. The enterprises who won the Data Awards· Best Data- Driven Growth Award are as follows:
## Data Awards · Best Data Technology Innovation Award

They have long attached importance to enterprise data technology development, as well as data science team construction. Through constantly digging data value, or using external data analysis tools to explore a variety of application scenarios of data fusion, enterprises can finally achieve sustained and rapid business growth. The enterprises who won the Data Awards · Best Data Technology Innovation Award are as follows:
